notification-tune-04.content: Bells are off by a few seconds every day. Scroll down to the settings to make the timer accurate.

notification-new-themes-04.content: You can upload background images now! Go to settings to upload your own background image.

notification-new-features-01.content: There are more customization options now! Go to settings to check them out.

notification-new-features-02.content: You can add custom quick links now! Go to settings to add or remove quick links.

notification-tune-01.content: Bells are around 30 seconds early. Go to settings to tune Chime so that the timer is accurate.

notification-tune-02.content: Bells are around 7 seconds late now. Go to settings to tune Chime so that the timer is accurate.

notification-tune-03.content: Bells are off by a few seconds every day. Go to settings to make the timer accurate.

notification-new-themes-02.content: If you don't like the current themes, you can make your own!

notification-new-themes-03.content: New Halloween theme until Nov 7. If you have the theme on, it will stay on even after Nov 7.

notification-feedback-error-01.content: The feedback feature was broken; please resubmit any feedback you would like me to add.
